home.heroTitle: I'm luna, a software engineer turned business builder.
home.posterNote: I've spent the past few years at the crossroads of technology and markets: building enterprise systems in Japan, researching crypto trends at a digital asset exchange, and earning an MBA along the way. Now I'm focused on AI, wealth thinking, and what it means to build a meaningful career in a world that's changing faster than any roadmap can predict. I write about what I'm learning. I build things on the side. I'm fluent in Chinese, Japanese, and English, and slowly conquering French.
home.baseBody: I'm fluent in Chinese, Japanese, and English, and slowly conquering French.

projects.pageSubtitle: Selected work and active explorations. Some are live, others in progress.
projects.moreComing: More projects documented as they mature.

writing.pageSubtitle: Essays, notes, and research. A knowledge space in progress.

about.intro: I'm Luna, a software engineer turned business builder. I've spent the past few years at the crossroads of technology and markets: building enterprise systems in Japan, researching crypto trends at a digital asset exchange, and earning an MBA along the way. Now I'm focused on AI, wealth thinking, and what it means to build a meaningful career in a world that's changing faster than any roadmap can predict. I write about what I'm learning. I build things on the side. I'm fluent in Chinese, Japanese, and English, and slowly conquering French.
about.focus: AI × Crypto. Building useful products. Learning in public.
about.background: Engineering at Toyota Systems, MBA from Laurentian University, fluent in Chinese, Japanese, and English.

timeline.heading: Experience Timeline
timeline.summary: Latest resume content shown from most recent to oldest.

description: - Conducted market research and competitive analysis covering industry trends, major exchange dynamics, and blockchain ecosystem developments.
- Produced competitive comparison reports evaluating product innovations and user growth strategies across platforms.
- Compiled market data and insights to support management decisions and marketing direction.
- Managed daily operations and content strategy for the exchange's official Twitter/X account.
- Planned and published market updates, product promotions, and community engagement content.
- Tracked account performance metrics and continuously optimized content to boost engagement and follower growth.
- Participated in design work, assisting with marketing materials and product-related visual content.
- Built and implemented an Excel-based inventory and cost-profit management system.
- Designed inventory tracking modules covering full inbound and outbound workflows.
- Established Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) to ensure financial data consistency and traceability.
- Created cost-profit analysis models to support daily operational decisions.
- Handled daily financial operations including bookkeeping, payroll processing, and monthly financial reporting.
- Served as the project coordination for an iOS application at OceanInk, managing schedules, facilitating team communication, and tracking deliverables.
- Collaborated closely with development, design, and marketing teams to ensure the smooth execution of project milestones.
- Contributed to UI/UX design discussions by providing user-centered feedback and assisting in aligning design with project goals.
- Supported marketing efforts by coordinating promotional activities aimed at increasing app visibility and user engagement.
- Maintained project documentation, monitored progress, and proactively addressed any communication gaps across teams.
- Studied Business Administration with courses in Project Management, Business Analysis, Managerial Economics, and so on.
- Self-studied various technologies.

entries.institution: SYSystem Co., Ltd. | Assigned to Toyota Systems

subEntries.subTitle: OutSystems Support Team
description: - Provided technical support for the use of the OutSystems platform, resolving technical issues and delivering customized solutions.
- Modified and developed internal applications and APIs based on requirements.
- Independently designed and implemented a REST API to connect with Snowflake for data access.

subEntries.subTitle: Year-End Audit - Web Application
description: Completed a web application project for the annual audit.

subEntries.subTitle: Development Team
description: Developed and maintained internal applications to support core business functions.

subEntries.subTitle: Java Instructor - Employment Training Program
description: Taught Java as part of a government employment training project.

subEntries.subTitle: Payroll Management System Development
description: Worked on developing an internal payroll management system focusing on role management, development, and testing.

entries.institution: Xi'An Yuri Software (SYSystem Co., Ltd.'s Xi'an branch)
description: - Interned at this branch office while awaiting the processing of Japanese work visa, temporarily delayed due to COVID.
- Undertoke basic programming tasks and provide support to other employees.
- Continued training in programming, data structures, and algorithms.
Studied Japanese language and culture; achieved JLPT-N1 Level.

subEntries.institution: Xi'An Yuri Software (SYSystem Co., Ltd.'s Xi'an branch)
description: - Received training in programming, data structures, and algorithms after passing the interview of SYSystem Co., Ltd..
- Earned a programmer certification recognized in China, Japan, and South Korea.

subEntries.subTitle: Internship at Hotel
description: Worked as Front Desk, supporting daily operations, guest check-ins and check-outs, and handling guest inquiries.
